text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

On 08/21/11 14:44, Fabian Wenk wrote:
> Hello Steve
> 
> On 21.08.2011 20:18, Steve Wills wrote:
> 
>> If you're using Ruby 1.9, give this patch a try.
> 
> I am, and your patch is working:
> 
> root@batman:~# portupgrade -an
> --->  Session started at: Sun, 21 Aug 2011 20:39:22 +0200
> --->  Skipping 'bsdpan-Bot-Pastebot-0.52' because it is held by user
> (specify -f to force)
> --->  ** Upgrade tasks 1: 0 done, 0 ignored, 0 skipped and 0 failed
> ** None has been installed or upgraded.
> --->  Session ended at: Sun, 21 Aug 2011 20:39:53 +0200 (consumed 00:00:31)
> root@batman:~#
> 
> 
> Thank you for your very fast response, great work.
> 

Sorry, missed this message. Thanks for testing. Would you mind testing
the other set? If they work too, I'll see about getting them added then
ping the PR originator and see about getting it closed.

Steve
